arts.ttl: AFC Wimbledon v Salford starting line-ups: Jackson names unchanged side in promotion clash
arts.sum: Subs: Ward, Furlong, O’Toole, Kelly, Sasu, Pigott, Hutchinson. Salford are seventh in League Two – just inside the play-off spots – but are four points away from the South Londoners.
